name: slot-art-creator-node-mcp
description: Node.js MCP server for slot-art-creator — exposes eight tools across two model families. NB2 family (Gemini/fal.ai): nb2_generate, nb2_edit, nb2_upscale, nb2_smart_resize. GPT Image 2 family (OpenAI): gpt2_generate, gpt2_edit, gpt2_smart_resize (per-aspect recompose, preserves text). Plus the cross-family nb2_stage_image helper. gpt-image-2's stable native ceiling is 2K (4K targets are experimental per OpenAI); no faithful upscale mode — use nb2_upscale for that.
